'''Yang Fire Dragon''' is the 53rd of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 丙 Hinoe (yang fire, the gaia-aligned face of summer), and its branch is 辰 Tatsu, the [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's fire generates the branch's earth, a relationship of nourishment.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Wood Rabbit]] (node 52) and [[Yin Fire Snake]] (node 54).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Hinoe (丙)]] — yang fire
* '''Branch:''' [[Dragon (zodiac)|Dragon (辰)]] — yang earth
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' summer

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Wood Rabbit]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Fire Snake]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q904721}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
